_schema.description: Future integration tasks and backlog items for the cold call workflow

tasks.title: SpokePhone API Integration
tasks.description: Connect SpokePhone call logs to the daily workflow. Needs OAuth2 credentials (SPOKE_CLIENT_ID + SPOKE_CLIENT_SECRET). Will pull call logs, durations, dispositions, recording URLs.

tasks.title: Clay.com Enrichment Pipeline
tasks.description: Connected via webhook + Google Sheets. Webhook receives company data, Clay enriches (Claygent + phone waterfall), pushes to Google Sheet 'Clay Enriched Results'. Claude Code reads sheet and loads to Salesfinity.

tasks.title: Salesfinity Call Log Sync
tasks.description: Now unblocked. Endpoint is /v1/call-log (singular). 8,039 records available. Need to build daily sync into workflow to pull new calls, match to prospects, update pipeline stages.

tasks.title: Recording Library Transcription Pipeline
tasks.description: Automated transcription of all .m4a recordings using Whisper. 20/23 complete. Needs permanent ffmpeg install. Feed transcripts into Lovable recording library tab.
